---
title: "Welcome!"
toc: false
about:
  template: solana
  image: Pictures/about.jpeg
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nathen-byford/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/nathenbyford
    - icon: envelope-fill
      text: Email
      href: mailto:nathen_byford1@baylor.edu
---

## I'm Nathen Byford,
Nice to meet you! I'm a passionate statistician looking for opportunities to make the world a better and safer place using data science and statistical methods. 
I specialize in transforming complex datasets into actionable insights while empowering organizations to embrace statistical best practices. My mission is to bridge the gap between sophisticated data analysis and practical implementation, making advanced statistical concepts accessible and valuable for decision-makers.

---

### My areas of interest are 
* Computational statistics, 
* Machine learning, 
* Data processing,
* Data visualization, 
* Anomaly detection, and 
* Count data modeling.

---
## Education

**Baylor University** | Waco, TX  
M.S. in Statistics - Dec. 2023 

**Baylor University** | Waco, TX  
B.S. in Statistics - May 2021
